title: Despite 40% Rise This Year Is Akamai Stock A Better Pick Than VeriSign?
text: Given its better prospects, we believe Akamai stock (NASDAQ NDAQ : AKAM) is a better pick than its industry peer, Verisign stock (NASDAQ: VRSN). Investors have assigned a higher valuation multiple of 15x revenues for VeriSign VRSN compared to 4.7x revenues for Akamai due to VeriSign's superior profitability and solid financial position, as discussed below.
